div.p: Message: Invalid argument supplied for foreach()

serStmt.serInfo: Kenya National Bureau of Statistics. Kenya Integrated Household Budget Survey 2015-2016 [dataset]. Version 01. Nairobi: KNBS [producer and distributor] 2018.

stdyInfo.abstract: The 2015-2016 Kenya Integrated Household Budget Survey was conducted over a 12-month period to obtain up-to-date data on a range of socioeconomic indicators used to monitor the implementation of development initiatives. The findings are presented at national, county, and rural and urban levels.
stdyInfo.notes: The Survey collected data on household characteristics, housing conditions, education, general health characteristics, nutrition, household income and credit, household transfers, information communication technology, domestic tourism, shocks to household welfare and access to justice.

useStmt.citReq: Kenya National Bureau of Statistics. Kenya Integrated Household Budget Survey 2015-2016 [dataset]. Version 01. Nairobi: KNBS [producer and distributor] 2018.
useStmt.conditions: Public use files, available to all
